claim.label: Gross logo churn
claim.raw_text: Gross logo churn was 3.1% for Q4.

evidence.span_text: No quarterly gross logo churn metric was approved for this review cycle.

verdict.rationale: No vault span states a gross logo churn value for Q4 2025; the operations review explicitly notes that no quarterly gross logo churn metric was approved for the cycle, and the customer appendix contains no churn figure.
verdict.suggested_action: Request the approved gross logo churn calculation or underlying customer start/end counts to verify the 3.1% figure, or remove the claim from the master document if no approved metric exists.
